topic: How to create a Gmail account from scratch

inputs.topic: How to create a Gmail account from scratch

lesson.teacherTitle: How to Create a Gmail Account
lesson.teacherObjective: After this lesson, you will be able to create your own Gmail account and send an email.
teacherBoardPoints: Use your real name for email
Subject line is brief and clear
Gmail is free on your phone
lesson.teacherExplanation:
Today we will learn how to create a Gmail account from scratch. Gmail is one of the most used email services around the world, especially for business purposes. Having a professional email address is essential in today's digital age, especially if you're looking to apply for jobs or run a business.

In KwaZulu-Natal, businesses like Inkify use email alongside WhatsApp to send important documents, like invoices, to their customers. With a Gmail account, you can reach not only local businesses but also explore global opportunities.

By the end of this lesson, you will know how to create your Gmail account and send an email. This skill will help you stay connected and look professional in your interactions—even if you're just starting your own small business.
teacherDiscussionQuestions: Why is a professional email important for young people today?
What challenges might someone face when creating their first email account?
How can having a Gmail account help you with opportunities in your local area?
lesson.teacherLocalExample: Inkify, run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, uses Gmail to send formal quotations and invoices to their customers. This ensures they maintain professionalism and keep a reliable record of communication.
teacherTimeGuide: 5 min: write board points, students copy
10 min: students do task on phones
5 min: recap — what is one thing you learned?
lesson.taskTitle: How to Create a Gmail Account
lesson.taskIntro: You will have your own Gmail account and be ready to send emails professionally.
lesson.taskReflection: Describe a situation where you might need to use your new Gmail account in the next few months, such as applying for a job or sending important documents.

lesson.teacherPlanHTML:
Learning Objective

How to Create a Gmail Account

After this lesson, you will be able to create your own Gmail account and send an email.

✏ Write on the Board
Write these before class starts — students copy them down
  • A professional email is important
  • Use your real name for email
  • Subject line is brief and clear
  • One email, one topic
  • Gmail is free on your phone

2Explain to Students

Read this aloud — then explain in your own words

Today we will learn how to create a Gmail account from scratch. Gmail is one of the most used email services around the world, especially for business purposes. Having a professional email address is essential in today's digital age, especially if you're looking to apply for jobs or run a business.

In KwaZulu-Natal, businesses like Inkify use email alongside WhatsApp to send important documents, like invoices, to their customers. With a Gmail account, you can reach not only local businesses but also explore global opportunities.

By the end of this lesson, you will know how to create your Gmail account and send an email. This skill will help you stay connected and look professional in your interactions—even if you're just starting your own small business.

3Discussion Questions

  1. 1Why is a professional email important for young people today?
  2. 2What challenges might someone face when creating their first email account?
  3. 3How can having a Gmail account help you with opportunities in your local area?

4Local Example

Inkify, run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, uses Gmail to send formal quotations and invoices to their customers. This ensures they maintain professionalism and keep a reliable record of communication.
Time Guide — 1 hour
5 minwrite board points, students copy
15 minteacher explains
10 minclass discussion
10 minstudents do task on phones
5 minrecap — what is one thing you learned?
